content: I thought it might be good to have a topic where people could post recent preprints or articles that they've written, just to keep a running stream of what people are doing?

Some Zulip instances have a #checkins stream where the topics are users' names, and most of the messages are from that user (with some replies; it's all just a convention anyway). On-topic and off-topic can (potentially) go there, e.g. "been working on this functional programming thing lately" as well as "Week 3 of the COVID-19 lockdown..".
